name: @airferry/sender
description: AirFerry sender — Chrome/Edge/Firefox extension that streams QR codes.

scripts.build: node scripts/extract-lzma-wasm.cjs && node scripts/build-wasm.cjs && node scripts/build-all.cjs
scripts.build:chrome-mv3: node scripts/extract-lzma-wasm.cjs && plasmo build --target=chrome-mv3 && node scripts/fix-manifest.cjs chrome-mv3-prod && cp node_modules/@foxglove/wasm-zstd/dist/wasm-zstd.wasm build/chrome-mv3-prod/wasm-zstd.wasm
scripts.build:chrome-mv2: node scripts/extract-lzma-wasm.cjs && plasmo build --target=chrome-mv2 && node scripts/fix-manifest.cjs chrome-mv2-prod && cp node_modules/@foxglove/wasm-zstd/dist/wasm-zstd.wasm build/chrome-mv2-prod/wasm-zstd.wasm
scripts.build:firefox-mv3: node scripts/extract-lzma-wasm.cjs && plasmo build --target=firefox-mv3 && node scripts/fix-manifest.cjs firefox-mv3-prod && cp node_modules/@foxglove/wasm-zstd/dist/wasm-zstd.wasm build/firefox-mv3-prod/wasm-zstd.wasm
scripts.build:firefox-mv2: node scripts/extract-lzma-wasm.cjs && plasmo build --target=firefox-mv2 && node scripts/fix-manifest.cjs firefox-mv2-prod && cp node_modules/@foxglove/wasm-zstd/dist/wasm-zstd.wasm build/firefox-mv2-prod/wasm-zstd.wasm
scripts.wasm:legacy: wasm-pack build ../../core/transfer-engine --target web --out-dir pkg-legacy -- --features wasm,serde && rm -rf wasm-pkg-legacy && cp -r ../../core/transfer-engine/pkg-legacy wasm-pkg-legacy
scripts.wasm:simd: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=+simd128' wasm-pack build ../../core/transfer-engine --target web --out-dir pkg-simd -- --features wasm,serde && rm -rf wasm-pkg-simd && cp -r ../../core/transfer-engine/pkg-simd wasm-pkg-simd

manifest.name: AirFerry - 无网文件传输
manifest.description: 通过屏幕二维码视频流，无网传输文件到手机。无需网络、蓝牙、USB。
